RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Temporary Restraining Order And Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause to Defendants Re: Temporary Restraining Order and Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed. Appearances: Mia S. Blackler, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer (415) 227-0900 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for preliminary injunction and appointment of receiver is Granted. No opposition filed. Receiver Bond in the amount of $15,000; and, Plaintiff's Injunction Bond in the amount of $5,000 are approved. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
